productDisplayName: Status Quo Men Stripes Maroon Tshirts
description: Composition Maroon polo neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has thin blue stripes, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, ribbed collar with buttoned chest placket, mock cambric collar with a zippered placket, appliqued and printed brand detailing on the upper left chest and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in warm water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Heavy duty masculine elements like aggressive brand detailing on the left chest and a mock collar with zippered placket lends a rugged edge to this striped polo neck T-shirt from status quo. Crafted from 100% cotton, the fabric offers exemplary comfort. Team this with jeans or chinos. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6', Shoulders: 19"
